title: Staff dress code
content: Staff members must wear smart casual attire. Overly casual clothing, such as ripped jeans or casual t-shirts, is prohibited unless specified for particular events or activities.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Staff Requirements

title: Professionalism modeling
content: Faculty members are encouraged to model professionalism through their appearance.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Staff Requirements

title: student dress code adherence
content: All students are required to adhere to the dress code, which mandates wearing clean and appropriate attire that supports an effective learning atmosphere.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Student Requirements

title: length requirement for shorts and skirts
content: Shorts and skirts worn by students must be of modest length.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Student Requirements

title: prohibition of offensive imagery on clothing
content: Student clothing must not display offensive imagery or text.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Student Requirements

title: Accessory guidelines for students and staff
content: Students and staff are allowed to wear accessories that align with the dress code, ensuring they do not disrupt the learning environment or pose safety risks.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Accessory Guidelines

title: Headwear policy
content: Headwear is not permitted indoors unless worn for religious or medical reasons.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Accessory Guidelines

title: Image Montessori School Valencia dress code policy
content: The Image Montessori School Valencia implements a dress code policy to foster an environment aligned with values of respect, diversity, and professionalism. The policy is designed to ensure that every individual feels valued and respected, while maintaining the integrity of the school's educational setting.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > Statement of Values

title: Prohibited clothing items for staff
content: Staff are not permitted to wear mini-skirts, hot pants, or lycra cycling shorts shorter than mid-thigh.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Restrictions on casual wear for staff
content: Staff must not wear leisure shorts, tracksuits, or sportswear unless it is for physical education or related activities.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Prohibited tops for staff
content: Staff are prohibited from wearing transparent or see-through blouses, dresses, or shirts. Low-cut tops, crop-tops, and vest or spaghetti-strap tops are also not allowed.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Clothing condition requirements for staff
content: Staff must avoid wearing clothing with tears, holes, or rips and clothes bearing offensive logos, slogans, or graphics.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Headwear restrictions for staff
content: Wearing baseball caps or hats indoors is not permitted for staff.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Footwear restrictions for staff
content: Staff must refrain from wearing high-heeled stiletto shoes or beach flip-flops indoors.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Safety and functionality of staff clothing
content: Staff must wear clothing that does not restrict movement or present risks of snagging on equipment, which includes avoiding loose pockets, sequins, and large buttons.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: Underwear visibility restrictions for staff
content: Staff must ensure their underwear is not worn in a revealing manner.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: acceptable staff clothing
content: Acceptable clothing for staff includes knee-length skirts and dresses, blouses, smart t-shirts, polo shirts, trousers, smart jeans, and chinos.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.5. Staff Dress Code

title: jewellery guideline
content: Students must not wear jewellery that dangles, including hoop earrings and large necklaces, to ensure health and safety. On physical education (PE) days, students must be able to remove stud earrings or other items if necessary.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: subtle make-up policy
content: Students from Year 7 upwards may wear subtle make-up, including mascara, powder, foundation, and nail varnish, but are not permitted to wear lipstick.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: acrylic nails restriction
content: Students are not allowed to have acrylic nails that extend longer than two millimetres from the fingertip to ensure health and safety.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: shorts and skirts requirement
content: Students must wear shorts and skirts that cover the upper thighs, measuring ¾ length or longer. Cycling shorts are permitted on PE days if they also cover the upper thighs.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: clothing condition standard
content: Students must wear clothes that are free from holes or rips and ensure all underwear is not visible by covering it with outerwear.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Outdoor shoe requirements for students
content: Students must wear flat, enclosed shoes outdoors that are comfortable and fastened with laces, buckles, zips, or velcro, ensuring they can independently put them on and take them off.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Indoor shoe requirements for students
content: Students are required to wear closed-toe indoor shoes to ensure safe walking. Bulky, furry, or flip-flop styles are not allowed indoors. Additionally, students are recommended to wear anti-slip socks.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Hats during playground time
content: Students and staff are allowed to wear hats during playground time to protect from the sun.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Religious headwear regulations
content: Students may wear religious headwear at all times, provided it does not obscure their vision, but it must be removed during PE lessons for health and safety reasons.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Hair length and style
content: Students can have hair of any length and any style, but long hair must be tied back during PE classes for safety.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: student clothing requirement
content: Students must wear appropriate sports underwear, shorts or leggings or tracksuit bottoms, a t-shirt or a sweatshirt, and trainers.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Student Dress Code Guidelines
content: The student dress code guidelines require all students to adhere to the designated dress code as set out by the school. Students are expected to dress in a manner that is appropriate, respectful, and consistent with an environment of learning and inclusivity.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance

title: Respect for Dress Code
content: All members of the school community are asked to respect the student dress code guidelines as part of fostering an inclusive environment.
source_spans: Dress Code Policy — Students and Staff > 2.4. Student Dress Code — General Guidance
